name: image-hash-rename
title: Image Hash Rename
description: Rename images in a folder by appending a content-based MD5 hash to the filename.
author: saury

commands.name: add-image-hash
commands.title: Add Hash to Images
commands.description: Renames all images in the chosen folder to [name].[hash8].[ext] using MD5 content hash.

preferences.name: folder
preferences.title: Image Folder
preferences.description: The folder containing images to rename.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
